content:
# Modular Summer Internship 2025 - Models Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Modular Summer Internship 2025 - Models internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** 🔒
**Application Status:** Open for Applications

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Modular
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Modular is offering a Summer Internship 2025 - Models internship position in 🔒. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Modular's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Modular interview and increase your chances of success.
